verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There He was The Man who would be Savior, So alone, rejected and despised. There He was Like a common criminal, For a Man who never even lied He was to be crucified.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He took it all The pain and all the suffering, What fell on Him Was something we deserved. He could have tried To plead and say "Not guilty" I was so amazed that throughout His fall He refused to spealk at all.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He never said a word, No complaints were heard; Tho' they treated Him so bad He never said a word. Like a lamb about to die, In place of you and I; Tho' no one cared about His fate He never said a word… not a word.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: By His death We could receive forgiveness, For His sake we will be justified; Now I know Why He didn't say anything, For He saw the joy after all the pain That won't be in vain.
